151 _39RG MEMRY_GOAL_CD (39Rg) Social Cognition - Memory: Goal CHAR 2 A score indicating the desired goal for the patient to achieve for memory at discharge. Memory includes skills related to recognizing and remembering while performing daily activities in an institutional or community setting. Memory in this context includes the ability to store and retrieve information, particularly verbal and visual. 01 = Helper - Complete
